Localization.Description: A user created, removed, or renamed a role

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} created the role "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the role "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} renamed the role "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
